scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix host" "npm run start --prefix decide" "npm run start --prefix checkout" "npm run start --prefix blogs"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix host" "npm run dev --prefix decide" "npm run dev --prefix checkout" "npm run dev --prefix blogs"
scripts.dev:wrangler: concurrently "npm run dev:wrangler --prefix host" "npm run dev --prefix decide" "npm run dev --prefix checkout" "npm run dev --prefix blogs"
